name: wero
description: Make your product catalog visible to AI agents with a dynamic /llms.txt endpoint powered by Workers AI.

MERCHANT_DESCRIPTION.description: A short description of your store for AI agents

SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN.description: Your Shopify *.myshopify.com domain (leave empty to use sample catalog)

MERCHANT_VERTICAL.description: Your product vertical — guides how AI describes products (e.g., 'outdoor gear', 'electronics', 'fashion')

STORE_CURRENCY.description: Currency code for prices in llms.txt output (default: USD)

ENRICHMENT_CACHE_TTL.description: How long enriched products are cached in seconds (default: 3600)

AI_MODEL.description: Workers AI model ID for enrichment (default: @cf/google/gemma-4-26b-a4b-it)
